title: Check query chunk pruning
description: Run EXPLAIN on a time-series query and report whether the planner prunes to the expected chunks.
body: Use when a time-series query is slow. Actions: run the engine's EXPLAIN on the query, read which chunks are scanned vs excluded, and confirm a time predicate is driving exclusion. Report the scanned-chunk count and whether a missing time bound caused a full scan. Do not declare a query optimized from latency alone — confirm pruning in the plan. This skill exposes capability only and must not run heavy queries against production without permission. Validation signals include the plan showing chunk exclusion. Risk boundary: an unbounded full-history scan can saturate shared I/O — flag before running it live.
